CustomField.description: The formulated and standardized opp name
CustomField.formula:
BLANKVALUE(Account.Account_Short_Name__c , LEFT( Account.Name ,40))
& "-" & TEXT(YEAR(CloseDate))
& "-" & BLANKVALUE( Primary_Contact_LastName__c ,"")
& "-(" & SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE( fxProductLines__c,";","/")," ","") & ")"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The formulated and standardized opp name
CustomField.label: fxOppName
